headlines.headline: Nike's trademark filing for Bronny James' 'B9'logo denied
headlines.description: Nike's trademark filing for Lakers' guard Bronny James' "B9" logo has been refused due to a "likelihood of confusion" with an already-registered mark.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: James Harden has it all to prove in the playoffs
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith believes James Harden needs a strong showing for the Cavs in the playoffs to help reverse the narrative surrounding him.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: KD hasn't been relevant in the postseason in years
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith explains why he believes Kevin Durant has more on the line than LeBron James does in the in the Rockets' series vs. the Lakers.

headlines.headline: Schefter drops some Hornets wisdom on Iman Shumpert
headlines.description: Adam Schefter and Iman Shumpert discuss the Hornets' chances against the Pistons in the NBA playoffs.

headlines.headline: Should Luka play against the Rockets in the first round?
headlines.description: Iman Shumpert and Alan Hahn discuss the possibility of Luka Doncic returning for the Lakers to play against the Rockets in the playoffs.

headlines.headline: Curry to be on minutes restriction in Warriors' must-win play-in
headlines.description: Stephen Curry is one of three Golden State Warriors who will be on a minutes restriction in the team's play-in game against the Clippers in Los Angeles on Wednesday.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Tennessee Titans updates, intel, buzz
headlines.description: The Titans pick early in Round 1 and have nine total selections in the 2026 draft. Here's the latest on what Tennessee might do.

headlines.headline: Cole Payton's NFL draft profile
headlines.description: Check out some of the top highlights from North Dakota State's Cole Payton.

headlines.headline: Why Tannenbaum says Steelers should draft Ty Simpson
headlines.description: Mike Tannenbaum and Jason McCourty discuss why the Steelers should consider drafting Alabama quarterback Ty Simpson even if Aaron Rodgers returns.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest Dallas Cowboys updates, intel, buzz
headlines.description: The Cowboys have eight picks, two in Round 1. Here's the latest on what Dallas might do in the 2026 NFL draft.

headlines.headline: Schefter explains how teams will evaluate Rueben Bain Jr.
headlines.description: Adam Schefter reports on Rueben Bain Jr.'s involvement in a 2024 auto accident and how NFL teams are now evaluating the star edge rusher.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft: Which teams should trade up, down in Round 1?
headlines.description: Would it make sense for the Eagles, Bears and Chiefs to trade up in Round 1? Should the Cowboys and Lions try to move down the board? Here's our advice for 10 teams.

headlines.headline: Sabres win Atlantic, 1st division title since 2009-10 season
headlines.description: After ending their long playoff drought, the Sabres topped it by winning the Atlantic Division on Monday, their first division title since 2009-10.

headlines.headline: NHL teams' offseason keys, including free agency, draft needs
headlines.description: We explore the next moves each team should make this summer and forecast expectations for 2026-27.

headlines.headline: NHL playoff watch: What to watch in each of Tuesday's games
headlines.description: There isn't much season left to determine playoff seeding and draft lottery order. Here's a rundown of what's on tap.
